reviews.comment:
Bastante raro me resultó que quise pagar en el full con la aplicación de YPF y me dijeron que no se podía... Terminamos pagando con efectivo. La chica que nos atendió se ve que no había tenido una buena noche, ya que fue bastante mal hablada en sus respuestas... Todo lo demás bien

(Translated by Google)
It was quite strange that I tried to pay at the gas station with the YPF app and they told me it wasn't possible... We ended up paying in cash. The girl who served us clearly hadn't had a good night, as she was quite rude in her responses... Everything else was fine
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURicVBySFR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para acampar. Lo único que le falto es el baño con duchas, no tenían agua caliente justo ese día.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place to camp. The only thing missing was a bathroom with showers; they didn't have hot water that day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiX2ZMTnhBRRAB
